name: Hittite Empire
continuity_note: Broad conventional imperial period used for demonstration.

name: New Kingdom of Egypt
continuity_note: Curated demonstration boundary; dynastic precision is intentionally not implied.

name: Carthage
continuity_note: Ends with the destruction of Carthage in the Third Punic War.

name: Sparta
continuity_note: Conventional independent Spartan polity period for this demonstration.

name: Achaemenid Empire
continuity_note: Ends as a rated entity with the Macedonian conquest; successor regimes do not inherit its rating.

name: Roman Republic
continuity_note: Separate rated polity from the Roman Empire under the project's historiographic-entity rule.

name: Athens
continuity_note: Classical democratic and imperial-era Athens only.

name: Macedonian Empire of Alexander
continuity_note: Alexander's imperial polity; the Diadochi successor kingdoms require separate future entities.

name: Seleucid Empire
continuity_note: Time-bounded Cliopatria interval. Namesakes, predecessors, and successors receive no inherited rating without an explicit continuity decision.

name: Kingdom of Pergamon
continuity_note: Time-bounded Cliopatria interval. Namesakes, predecessors, and successors receive no inherited rating without an explicit continuity decision.

name: Kingdom of Numidia
continuity_note: Time-bounded Cliopatria interval. Namesakes, predecessors, and successors receive no inherited rating without an explicit continuity decision.

name: Roman Empire
region: Europe, North Africa, and West Asia
continuity_note: The project ends this rating line at the permanent 395 division. The Byzantine rating starts independently at baseline.

name: Sasanian Empire
continuity_note: Ends as a polity after the Rashidun conquest; later Iranian states receive new IDs.

name: Byzantine Empire
continuity_note: Explicit project convention: new entity and full Elo reset at 395. The predecessor link is descriptive and transfers no rating.

name: Frankish Kingdom
continuity_note: Broad Frankish polity used for the Tours demonstration record; later partitions are not merged into this rating.

name: Kingdom of Italy
continuity_note: Time-bounded Cliopatria interval. Namesakes, predecessors, and successors receive no inherited rating without an explicit continuity decision.

name: Rashidun Caliphate
continuity_note: Rated separately from the subsequent Umayyad Caliphate.

name: Umayyad Caliphate
region: West Asia, North Africa, and Iberia
continuity_note: New dynastic imperial entity and independent rating line.

name: First Bulgarian Empire
continuity_note: Time-bounded Cliopatria interval. Namesakes, predecessors, and successors receive no inherited rating without an explicit continuity decision.

name: Mongol Empire
